name: Local rules for chem exposure claims in Salt Lake City Utah?
description: File via Utah Labor Commission portal, 180-day notice.

mainEntity.name: Local rules for chem exposure claims in Salt Lake City Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: File via Utah Labor Commission portal, 180-day notice.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah Labor Commission handles via online portal; hearings in SLC for northern cases.** Strict 180-day notice.[6] Key factors: Form 12 filing, ALJ decisions appealable to court. Regional differences minimal; Boise follows Idaho Industrial Commission. Local firms know nuances.
